queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk reduction associated with present employment duration between four and seven years.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the relationship between checking account balances below zero and decreased credit risk.
